route: UserTesting paid website and app testing
value_signal: UserTesting says participants can get paid to test apps, prototypes, websites, and real-world experiences from home.
eligibility_or_region_notes: Public pages allow an email-based application and a practice test; approved participant status and screening fit determine task access.
deadline_or_currentness: Ongoing; current pages say new recorded tests are released all the time.
evidence_gate: Approved participant account plus completed test and verified payout.
ai_can_do_next: Prepare a truthful participant profile checklist and practice-test readiness note.
human_must_do_next: Human account owner must submit the email application, take the practice test, and personally complete tests.
automation_boundary: No account creation, login, screener submission, or private profile/payment data handling by Agent1.
why_this_is_not_income_yet: Open access is not income until a paid test is completed and payout is verified.
risk_flags: Task access is selective and requires the user to personally perform the studies.
known_blockers: Requires a truthful participant profile, a microphone-capable device, and approved participant status.
